hero.title: Handmade Modern Paintings
hero.subtitle: Shop original canvas art, large wall art, and custom paintings selected for living rooms, bedrooms, offices, and calm modern interiors.

artist.pageDesc: Meet the artists behind YiiArt and explore the works currently available for collectors.
artist.biographyComingSoon: Artist details are available on request.

home.featuredArtworksDesc: Original hand-painted works with clear sizing, international pricing, and collectible documentation.
home.ourArtistsDesc: Meet the artists behind each work, with biographies and available pieces kept together for collectors.
home.noArtworks: No artworks are available in this view right now.
home.noArtists: No artist profiles are available in this view right now.
home.findRightArtwork: Find the right artwork by room, style, and scale
home.collectionIntro: YiiArt collections are organized around the way collectors actually choose artwork: the wall, the room, the surface, the color mood, and the size of the piece.
home.practicalPath: A practical path from wall to checkout
home.needAdvice: Need scale, color, or framing advice?
home.adviceDesc: Send the wall size, a room photo, or the artwork link. YiiArt can help confirm whether the piece fits the room before you complete checkout.

0.title: Choose by room
0.text: Start from the wall, furniture scale, and mood of the space before choosing a work.

1.title: Confirm the size
1.text: Each artwork page gives dimensions in centimeters and inches, with advice available before purchase.

2.title: Ask on WhatsApp
2.text: Send a room photo or sizing question and receive direct guidance before checkout.

3.title: Receive documented art
3.text: Original works ship with careful packaging and collector documentation.

artworksPage.description: Browse original YiiArt paintings by room, style, color, scale, and orientation.
artworksPage.shopBy: Shop by room, style, color, or scale

newsletter.label: New artwork arrivals and collector notes
newsletter.success: Thank you. You are on the YiiArt list.

reviews.featuredDesc1: Real feedback from collectors who brought YiiArt original paintings into their homes.
reviews.featuredDesc2: Every review comes from a real collector experience. We welcome honest feedback about artwork quality, texture, color accuracy, packaging, delivery, and how the artwork feels in the space.
reviews.sectionDesc: See honest feedback from collectors who purchased this artwork or similar original pieces from YiiArt.
reviews.emptyArtwork: This artwork has not received a collector review yet. After purchase, verified collectors can share feedback about the artwork, texture, color, packaging, and room fit.
reviews.emptyPublic: No verified reviews are public yet.
reviews.trustText: We only publish reviews connected to real YiiArt purchases or manually verified collector experiences. Reviews are moderated for privacy, spam, and abuse, not to remove honest criticism.
reviews.noReviewsDesc: Collector reviews are published after approval and permission.
reviews.verifiedCollectorTitle: This review is connected to a real YiiArt purchase or a manually verified collector experience.

cookie.message: YiiArt uses essential cookies for checkout and optional analytics cookies to improve the store. You can accept analytics or keep only essential cookies.

price.estimate: Prices are displayed in {displayName} ({displayCurrency}) as an estimate. Secure checkout is processed in {checkoutName} ({checkoutCurrency}).
price.cny: Prices are listed in Chinese Yuan (CNY).
price.international: Prices are shown in {displayName} ({displayCurrency}) for international checkout. Duties and local taxes may be charged by the destination country.

product.noReviews: No reviews yet - Be the first collector to review this artwork
product.aboutFallback: {title} is selected for modern interiors and private collections. It is hand-painted, carefully documented, and prepared for secure international delivery.
product.confirmSize: Confirm exact artwork size before purchase.
product.defaultRooms: Best for living rooms, bedrooms, hallways, offices, and quiet statement walls.
product.defaultFramingAdvice: Send a wall photo on WhatsApp if you need frame, scale, or placement advice before checkout.
product.confirmText: Original art is a physical object, so the buying decision should include scale, surface, room light, framing, and shipping format. These details can be confirmed before payment.

0.title: Room fit
0.text: Best considered for living rooms, bedrooms, offices, hallways, and quiet statement walls.

1.title: Framing
1.text: Ask before purchase if you need advice on frame color, float framing, or keeping the canvas unframed.

2.title: Color confidence
2.text: Screens vary. Request extra daylight photos on WhatsApp if the palette must match a room.

0.title: Original artwork
0.text: One physical work, not a print edition.

1.title: Signed certificate
1.text: Collector documentation is included when available for the artwork.

2.title: Tracked delivery
2.text: Packaging format is selected according to artwork size and shipping safety.

3.title: 30-day return window
3.text: Return requests can be opened after delivery according to YiiArt policy.

textured-wall-art.title: Textured Wall Art
textured-wall-art.description: Layered surfaces, visible brushwork, and tactile paintings for quiet modern rooms.

abstract-art-for-living-room.title: Living Room Abstracts
abstract-art-for-living-room.description: Balanced abstract works selected for sofas, open-plan spaces, and statement walls.

large-canvas-art.title: Large Canvas Art
large-canvas-art.description: Large originals for feature walls, offices, hospitality spaces, and collector homes.

wabi-sabi-wall-art.title: Wabi-sabi Wall Art
wabi-sabi-wall-art.description: Quiet texture, imperfect surfaces, and grounded palettes for calm interiors.

bedroom-wall-art.title: Bedroom Wall Art
bedroom-wall-art.description: Softer compositions and measured color for bedrooms, reading corners, and private spaces.

neutral-canvas-art.title: Neutral Canvas Art
neutral-canvas-art.description: Minimal, textured, and earthy works for collectors building a restrained palette.
